c1.descriptionRaw:
When any of your own party members hits an opponent affected by an Omen, the effects of <color=#80C0FFFF>Hydro-related Elemental Reactions</color> are enhanced for 8s:
· Electro-Charged DMG increases by 15%, Lunar-Charged DMG increases by 15%, Vaporize DMG increases by 15%, Hydro Swirl DMG increases by 15%, Lunar-Crystallize DMG increases by 15%.
· Frozen duration is extended by 15%.
c1.name: Prophecy of Submersion

c2.descriptionRaw:
When a Normal Attack hits, there is a 20% chance that it will be automatically followed by a Charged Attack.
This effect can only occur once every 5s.
c2.name: Lunar Chain

c3.descriptionRaw:
Increases the Level of <color=#FFD780FF>Stellaris Phantasm</color> by 3.
Maximum upgrade level is 15.
c3.name: Restless Revolution

c4.descriptionRaw: When any party member attacks an opponent affected by an Omen, their CRIT Rate is increased by 15%.
c4.name: Prophecy of Oblivion

c5.descriptionRaw:
Increases the Level of <color=#FFD780FF>Mirror Reflection of Doom</color> by 3.
Maximum upgrade level is 15.
c5.name: Mockery of Fortuna

c6.descriptionRaw:
Upon entering <color=#FFD780FF>Illusory Torrent</color>, Mona gains a 60% increase to the DMG of her next Charged Attack per second of movement.
A maximum DMG Bonus of 180% can be achieved in this manner. The effect lasts for no more than 8s.
c6.name: Rhetorics of Calamitas

profile.description: A mysterious young astrologer who proclaims herself to be "Astrologist Mona Megistus," and who possesses abilities to match the title. Erudite, but prideful.
profile.name: Mona
profile.title: Astral Reflection

combat1.descriptionRaw:
<color=#FFD780FF>Normal Attack</color>
Performs up to 4 water splash attacks that deal <color=#80C0FFFF>Hydro DMG</color>.

<color=#FFD780FF>Charged Attack</color>
Consumes a certain amount of Stamina to deal <color=#80C0FFFF>AoE Hydro DMG</color> after a short casting time.

<color=#FFD780FF>Plunging Attack</color>
Gathering the might of Hydro, Mona plunges towards the ground from mid-air, damaging all opponents in her path. Deals <color=#80C0FFFF>AoE Hydro DMG</color> upon impact with the ground.
combat1.name: Ripple of Fate

combat2.descriptionRaw: Creates an illusory Phantom of Fate from coalesced waterspouts. Phantom Has the following special properties: ·Continuously taunts nearby opponents, attracting their fire. ·Continuously deals Hydro DMG to nearby opponents. ·When its duration expires, the Phantom explodes, dealing AoE Hydro DMG. Hold Utilizes water currents to move backwards swiftly before conjuring a Phantom. Only one Phantom created by Mirror Reflection of Doom can exist at any time. Skilled astrologers have always dreamed of using a phantom facsimile of themselves to ward off imminent ill fate, but Mona must be the first to make such a mockery of it in all of Teyvat.
combat2.name: Mirror Reflection of Doom

combat3.descriptionRaw: Mona summons the sparkling waves and creates a reflection of the starry sky, applying the Illusory Bubble status to opponents in a large AoE. Illusory Bubble Traps opponents inside a pocket of destiny and also makes them Wet. Renders weaker opponents immobile. When an opponent affected by Illusory Bubble sustains DMG, it has the following effects: ·Applies an Omen to the opponent, which gives a DMG Bonus, also increasing the DMG of the attack that causes it. ·Removes the Illusory Bubble, dealing Hydro DMG in the process. Omen During its duration, increases DMG taken by opponents. It was from the time that gods first traced the lights in the heavens with their eyes that the notion of "fate" was born.
combat3.name: Stellaris Phantasm

passive1.descriptionRaw:
After she has used <color=#FFD780FF>Illusory Torrent</color> for 2s, if there are any opponents nearby, Mona will automatically create a Phantom.
A Phantom created in this manner lasts for 2s, and its explosion DMG is equal to 50% of <color=#FFD780FF>Mirror Reflection of Doom</color>.
passive1.name: "Come 'n' Get Me, Hag!"

passive2.descriptionRaw: Increases Mona's <color=#80C0FFFF>Hydro DMG Bonus</color> by a degree equivalent to 20% of her Energy Recharge rate.
passive2.name: Waterborne Destiny

passive3.descriptionRaw: When Mona crafts Weapon Ascension Materials, she has a 25% chance to refund a portion of the crafting materials used.
passive3.name: Principium of Astrology

passive4.descriptionRaw:
After completing <color=#FFD780FF>Witch's Homework: Of Untested Insight</color>, Mona will become a <color=#FFD780FF>Hexerei</color> character. When the party includes at least 2 Hexerei characters, you will gain the <color=#FFD780FF>Hexerei: Secret Rite</color> effect, which enhances Hexerei characters.

<color=#FFD780FF>Hexerei: Secret Rite</color>
When Mona's Normal Attacks or Charged Attacks hit an opponent, she gains 1 stack of <color=#FFD780FF>Astral Glow of Mercury</color>, for 8s. Max 3 stacks. This effect can grant at most one stack every 0.1s. When other party members trigger a Vaporize reaction on an enemy, all Astral Glow of Mercury stacks are consumed. Each stack consumed increases the damage of that Vaporize reaction by 5%.
Additionally, when Mona's Normal Attacks or Charged Attacks hit an opponent, the enemy's <color=#FFD780FF>Omen</color> duration is extended by 2s. This effect can trigger at most once every 0.5s, and can extend the Omen by up to 8s through this method.
passive4.name: Witch's Eve Rite: Genesis of Starsigns
